chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-953 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.4168/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 19.12.2025 Mr. Meer Buriro, Advocate along-with petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. == At the outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submitted that the petitioner applied for the post of Police Constable in the Sindh Police Department. The recruitment test, conducted by SIBA Testing Services, was successfully cleared by the petitioner, who secured 65 marks in the written examination. He further qualified in the interview held on 18.12.2024, obtaining 27 marks. The petitioner has been issued an offer of appointment as Police Constable (BPS-07) in Hyderabad District, Hyderabad Range, under the general recruitment Since the offer order has been issued, this Court directs the respondent- department to complete the codal formalities and formally issue the appointment letter in favour of the petitioner following the offer order in accordance with law. Without touching the merits of the case and with consent of the parties, this petition stands disposed of in the above terms, and the said exercise shall be completed within fifteen days. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
